title: SpaGIC: graph-informed clustering in spatial transcriptomics via self-supervised contrastive learning.
author: Liu W Wang B Bai Y Liang X Xue L Luo J
content: S-EPMC11562840 PMC11562840 SpaGIC: graph-informed clustering in spatial transcriptomics via self-supervised contrastive learning. Spatial transcriptomics technologies enable the generation of gene expression profiles while preserving spatial context, providing the potential for in-depth
